name: Bobbie's Mushroom & Spinach Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice 2 Portabello mushrooms and 8-10 Button mushrooms.
2. Slice 1 green pepper into strips.
3. Chop 3 green onions, including the green ends.
4. Mince 2 cloves of garlic.
5. Chop 2 stalks of celery.
6. Add 2 teaspoons of chili powder to taste.
7. Add 1 tablespoon of dried parsley or fresh cilantro to taste.
8. Wash and prepare a bunch of spinach leaves.
9. In a frying pan with a lid, sauté the garlic, onions, and celery in olive oil until almost tender.
10. Add the sliced mushrooms and green pepper; continue sautéing until cooked through.
11. Stir in 2 tablespoons of water, cover, and cook for a few minutes.
12. Mix in chili powder and parsley or cilantro to taste.
13. Add spinach and let it wilt; replace the lid and turn off the heat.
14. Warm tortillas by placing them on a small plate covered with a wet paper towel for 30 seconds in the microwave.
15. Spoon the prepared mixture onto each warm tortilla.
16. Optionally, add salsa, guacamole, or sour cream.
17. Serve and enjoy!
